name: GCP Applied Technologies Inc.
name_former: W. R. Grace & Co. (Construction Products division)
description: GCP Applied Technologies Inc. is a leading global provider of specialty construction chemicals and building materials. The company's product portfolio includes concrete admixtures, cement additives, active packaging technologies, and specialty barriers and waterproofing systems. GCP's products are used in major infrastructure projects, commercial and residential buildings, and industrial applications worldwide to improve the durability, strength, and energy efficiency of structures.
